decision.decision_basis: No Lean, Coq, Kani, or equivalent machine-checked theorem artifacts are committed. Public readiness and parity language must therefore describe tested invariant catalogs and proof-obligation tracking, not completed machine-checked formal proofs.
decision.human_override_policy: A future owner may replace this decision only by committing machine-checked proof artifacts and updating the proof binder gates.

required_current_wording: no machine-checked formal proof artifacts are committed yet

discharge or defer each proof obligation under explicit status
